lyrics.text: Floorfiller
Floorfiller
Hey Mr. DJ, in case you forgot
I came to get down So you better make it hot
lyrics.translation: 我来这儿是找乐的，所以你最好使气氛热烈

lyrics.text: Cause I can't jump around when I hear groove killers
lyrics.translation: 因为我无法跳舞，当我听见唱片杀手

lyrics.text: When I'm out sitting down, it's a clear time stealer
lyrics.translation: 当我坐在舞池之外忙完是个十足的时间浪费者

lyrics.text: Give me a track with a phat kind of beat
A groove so unique that it kicks me off my seat
lyrics.translation: 一首独一无二的能使我从椅子上跳起来的曲子

lyrics.text: Cause I won't find a mood with a new spine chiller
lyrics.translation: 因为听一个凉飕飕的曲子，我无法找到感觉

lyrics.text: When the crowd hits the room, it's a true crowd thiller
lyrics.translation: 当人群在舞池涌动，你是个真正的舞迷战栗者

lyrics.text: Freeze, better make it hot
Music please, blow the spot
Play that funky music
That is how we want it Floorfiller
lyrics.translation: 我们就是想要那样的，注满舞池

lyrics.text: That is how we need it Floorfiller
lyrics.translation: 我们就是想要那样的，注满舞池

lyrics.text: Something's outta order, people in the corners
lyrics.translation: 事情失去了秩序，呆在场边的人们

lyrics.text: Don't you see it
Can't you feel it
Floorfiller
Crank up a bass that can raise up the roof
lyrics.translation: 加快低音速度，我会抬高天花板

lyrics.text: A bomb diggy drum comin' at me with a poof
Gotta boom, shake the room, cause we're all heat seekers
lyrics.translation: 要撼动舞场，因为我们都是热力追求者

lyrics.text: With a jam that can slam down the walls, mindfreaker
lyrics.translation: 我们拥挤得可以推倒墙，思想怪异者

lyrics.text: Freeze, better make it hot
Music please, blow the spot
Play that funky music
That is how we want it
Floorfiller
That is how we need it
Floorfiller
Something's outta order, people in the corners
lyrics.translation: 事情失去了秩序，呆在场边的人们

lyrics.text: Don't you see it
Can't you feel it
You know by the sounds when the crowd is getting wild
lyrics.translation: 通过疯狂舞迷们的吵闹，你们可以知道

lyrics.text: Hands swinging high like a chopper in the sky
lyrics.translation: 挥舞的手，像飞翔的残肢断臂

lyrics.text: But a slow bump or flow ain't the way, floorfreezer
lyrics.translation: 而慢速的摇摆或舞动不合节奏，注满舞池

lyrics.text: See the name of the game is to play, crowd pleaser
lyrics.translation: 这个游戏的就是要放取悦舞迷的曲子

lyrics.text: Freeze, better make it hot
Music please, blow the spot
Play that funky music
That is how we want it
Floorfiller
That is how we need it
Floorfiller
Something's outta order, people in the corners
lyrics.translation: 事情失去了秩序，呆在场边的人们

lyrics.text: Don't you see it
Can't you feel it
That is how we want it
Floorfiller
